description: Style NoteRivet style embellishments never looked more stylish than in this strappy pair from catwalk. Tough straps with shiny metal detailing- what's not to love? This versatile pair can be worn in a zillion different ways. The best look we can think of is with a pencil cut leather skirt!    Product DetailsBlack sandals with straps on the upper with metal embellishments and a heel collar with a zipper closureSmooth and printed footbed with branding embossed on the heelRubber outsole with a heel    Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight    SizeHeel: 4& rdquo
